gut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Maléku Jaíka.
hew: verb. To chop away at; to whittle down; to mow down.
hie: verb. To hasten; to go quickly, to hurry.
hit: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Hittite.
hoe: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Horom.
hog: noun. Any animal belonging to the Suidae family of mammals, especially the pig, the warthog, and the boar.

how: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Honi.
